name: Budget Approval Engine
description:
Multi-function budget authorization engine. Pass a function name, JSON payload, and optional config JSON. Returns a JSON string.

Consolidated functions (5):
• getApprovalChain — Full approval chain + CEO check + display summary. Input: budget row with owner_roles.
• canUserApprove — Can the signed-in user approve at this step? Input: approver_id, approver_roles, budget row fields, approval_steps, completed_steps.
• getApprovalProgress — Workflow status + progress + next pending step. Input: approval_steps, completed_steps, rejected_step, auto_approved.
• validateSubmission — Pre-submit validation (errors/warnings). Input: budget row fields + category_count + owner_roles.
• getUserPermissions — Can the signed-in user edit/delete this budget? Input: budget row + user_id, user_roles.

Legacy aliases still supported: getRequiredApprovers, isCeoRequired, getApprovalChainSummary, getApprovalStatus, getNextPendingStep, canUserEditBudget, canUserDeleteBudget.
author: JAS
